tooltip.displayText: Kids Favourites Filter applied. Remove this filter to see the full Menu.

info.name: Choco Kunafa Waffle
info.description: Our signature dark choco Waff-Wich meets the VIRAL Dubai-Chocolate — and the rest is history ! A rich blend of dark chocolate, pistachio kunafa, and the creamy chocolate spread.

addons.groupName: Choose From Ice Cream for Choco Kunafa Waffle

info.name: Choco Colour Burst Waffle
info.description: A double dose of chocolatey goodness! Made with our rich Double Choco batter, filled with rich Belgian milk spread, loaded and topped with Cadbury Gems — finished with a burst of colourful sprinkles for that perfect crunch.

info.name: Colour Burst Sundae (L)
info.description: A scoop of happiness in every bite! Creamy vanilla ice cream paired with our red velvet waffle chunks, topped with strawberry compote, white chocolate spread, Cadbury Gems and colourful sprinkles — a perfect mix of choco, crunch, and colour.

info.name: KitKat Shake
info.description: A Chocoy Shake topped with Kit Kat bits! (Images are for representation purpose only)

info.name: Oreo Shake
info.description: Thick shake blended with tons of chocloate Oreos! (Images are for representation purpose only)

info.name: Belgian Chocomelt Shake
info.description: Your Favourite  Belgian Chocolate shake gets a new name! One of our Darker Choco Shakes made with pure indulgence! (Images are for representation purpose only)

info.name: Blueberry White Choco Shake
info.description: A smoothie blended with bluberries and white chocolate (Images are for representation purpose only)

info.name: Nutella Shake
info.description: Our Signature Shake made with real Nutella! (Images are for representation purpose only)

info.name: Signature Cold Coffee
info.description: Our Perfectly Balanced Cold Coffee (Images are for representation purpose only)

info.name: Lemon - Iced Tea
info.description: Refreshing Lemon Iced Tea (Images are for representation purpose only)

info.name: Peach - Iced Tea
info.description: Refreshing peach Iced tea (Images are for representation purpose only)

info.name: Death By Choco-rush
info.description: Dive into our signature Choco waff-wich, layered with milk Choco spread topped with hot Choco fudge, choco chips, Oreos, Kit Kat, and rich creamy Choco ice cream. It's a breath-stealing blend of pure indulgence!

info.name: KitKat Affair
info.description: Make the most of this Affair. Our crispy classic waff-wich is a masterpiece layered with melted Belgian white Choco topped with creamy vanilla ice cream, KitKat crumbs & drizzled with melted Belgian white and milk Choco. For KitKat lovers!

info.name: Nutella Overload
info.description: Unleash the mighty flavour with our crispy classic waff-wich layered in Nutella, crowned with vanilla ice cream, and topped with melted Belgian white Choco, Nutella spread, roasted almonds, and a playful wafer roll. It's a taste revolution!

info.name: Almond Fudge Brownie
info.description: Epitome of indulgence in every bite — a decadent fusion of Waff-wich & a brownie, layered with silky milk choco. Crowned with warm choco fudge, roasted almonds, Oreos, crunchy wafer rolls, and a generous scoop of creamy vanilla ice cream, this dessert is a symphony of textures and flavors.

info.name: Mini Treats
info.description: Treat your tribe! Save Rs. 91 flat & enjoy Mini Waffle pack of 4 (Chocoholic's) + Mini Waffle pack of 6 (Premium).
